title: Ellipse
description:
Ellipse: A plane curve. A standard ellipse defining a curve of constant combined distance around two foci.
The larger of the two radii defines the major axis of the Ellipse, and the line along which the two foci lie.

Centre.description: Origin point defining location of the Ellipse in three-dimensional space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Axis1.description: Together with Axis2 defines orientation in three-dimensional space. Direction only, and not magnitude, matters. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Axis2.description: Together with Axis1 defines orientation in three-dimensional space. Direction only, and not magnitude, matters. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Radius1.description: Distance from the Centre to a point on the Ellipse along Axis1. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Radius2.description: Distance from the Centre to a point on the Ellipse along Axis2. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
